summary: Linked workflow start now allows completed workflow sessions as historical context sources while preserving rejection for non-completed workflow source sessions.
evidence: RED: bun test src/server/__tests__/sessions.test.ts -t "completed workflow source sessions" failed with expected 201 / received 400 before the production fix.
GREEN: bun test src/server/__tests__/sessions.test.ts -t "completed workflow source sessions|non-completed workflow source" passed 2 tests.
GUARD: bun test src/server/__tests__/sessions.test.ts -t "WorkflowSessionLinkService should reject non-completed workflow" passed 1 test.
contracts: Completed workflow sessions are terminal historical context and may be used as linked workflow sources.
Non-completed workflow sessions remain invalid linked workflow sources.
